# Pull Request

## Type of Change

<!-- Pick all that apply. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation / knowledge update
- [ ] 🏛️ Architecture / ADR change
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance
- [ ] 🧪 Test only
- [ ] 🤖 CI / tooling

## Summary

<!-- One to three sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

<!-- Link related issues and ADRs. -->

- Closes #

## Cognitive Artifacts Updated

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `.cognition/identity/` (mission, vision, principles, ...)
- [ ] `.cognition/planner/` (current goal, iteration, backlog)
- [ ] `.cognition/architect/` (domain model, system context, notes)
- [ ] `.cognition/developer/` (implementation plan, current task)
- [ ] `.cognition/reviewer/` (review report, technical debt)
- [ ] `.cognition/curator/` (glossary, knowledge updates, lessons)
- [ ] `.cognition/researcher/` (research notes, experiments)
- [ ] `.cognition/memory/working/` (current context)
- [ ] `.cognition/memory/permanent/` (glossary, invariants, rules, ADRs)
- [ ] `.cognition/memory/history/` (decision log, timeline)
- [ ] `.cognition/memory/roadmap/` (roadmap, milestones)

If "none", explain why:

## Definition of Done

<!-- The full Definition of Done for this change. -->

- [ ] Code compiles / tests pass locally
- [ ] New tests added (or justification for why not)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Architectural review (if applicable)
- [ ] Cognitive layer artifacts updated
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII introduced
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered (or ADR explaining break)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added (if user-visible)

## Reviewer Checklist

<!-- Reviewers: tick as you check. -->

- [ ] Behavior matches description
- [ ] Tests cover the change adequately
- [ ] Code follows project conventions (`docs/conventions/`)
- [ ] No new technical debt introduced (or logged in `.cognition/reviewer/technical_debt.md`)
- [ ] Cognitive layer consistent with code
